title: Living in Boulder Vlog 6 - 30 - 2017: Buildings of Rome Book. Platner and Ashby.

enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a late-night vlog update covering his daily routine: visiting his mom's house to do chores, a bike ride along the river to the farmer's market area with his girlfriend Kirsten Rain, and ongoing work on a personal 'Buildings of Rome' book project where he is cataloguing and mapping ancient Roman houses by region on Google Earth. He also mentions wanting to get in shape and watching the show 'Bored' with Kirsten.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Deeply engaged; finds the Republican-era city with houses on the hills more interesting than later periods
Excited about the project and sees it as genuinely cool and worthwhile
Apologetic about posting less; prefers putting out meaningful content over filler
Feels he badly needs it and is considering committing to it

entities: Buildings of Rome (Platner and Ashby book)

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: On June 30, 2017, at 11:03 PM, Kyle decided to do some refururfing with his knife and powder.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle sprinkles powder on his ball, which cooks it out perfectly and gives him total control over the smoking process.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle mentions that the burn process leaves nothing behind.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Yesterday, Kyle worked late, then went to his mom's house to do dishes, vacuum, scoop out the dash in the fireplace, and went on an expedition.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle and his team wrote down their first expedition, which went up the river to the mall and the farmer's market area.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle describes a trusted gentleman who didn't move, and he came home to find a square jar from a movie.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle plans to figure out a bike route to get all over town.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle is working on his book, which is taking a while, and he is linking all the houses and dividing them into proper regions.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle is building a room on Google Earth, focusing on the Metropolis room, which was the biggest thick-out during the Republic.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle is rebuilding the room by identifying all the houses on the hills and planning to rebuild them.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle thinks he might get a good lawyer and mentions the population of 160 thousand people in order.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle needs to get in shape and feels he needs something badly.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle estimates he might need a couple more weeks to finish his books.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle listened to Tassets while working at his mom's house.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle finished watching an episode with his girlfriend Kirsten Rain and plans to start watching Board.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle watched Board himself to compare it with the first two episodes.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle apologizes for living in some of the US today and mentions he wants to add more reality and happy content to his videos.

transcript.text: Hey, how's it going? You know what I'm saying? It's June 30th, 2017 at 11.03 at night.
I figured I should do some refra. I've forgotten to do refra. I haven't done refra on YouTube for a while.
So the way that I do it is I have my knife and I just go and get my powder and I stick my knife in my powder and then I sprinkle it on top of my ball and it just cooks out perfectly.
It's like you have total control of how much you're smoking and it burns. It just burns until it's done. You only tap it and it just burns out. There's nothing left. I'm burnt.
So today, yesterday I was working pretty late and then I get up and I'm working and then I went over to my mom's house to do dishes and vacuum and scoop out the ash in the fireplace.
And then we rode down on our first expedition. That's a better length. Down up the river to like 13th, like the mall and then the farmer's market area, Boulder High.
And then down along sidewalks. She has a tricycle that fits even on the narrow sidewalks.
And then she did a movie and I came home and then I went and escorted her home from her movie and it was along another path.
So I want to figure out, I'm going to figure out how to get all over town on the bike path. It's going to be cool.
And so, yeah, today I worked on my, I worked on my, my book. Yeah, it's going to take a while.
My buildings of Rome book. I made, I took the list, the menu from Wikipedia, list of monuments.
Wikipedia. And then, uh, and then I'm looking at the ones that aren't, you know, that are on my book that aren't on the menu and expanding it.
And so right now I'm linking all of the houses. And so then I'm going to divide all the houses into their proper regions.
The regions of Rome are divided into like different hills, sides and between hills and stuff.
There are four originals and then I guess just made more 14 or something.
So yeah, uh, or 10, but yeah. So, um, and then I can build it on Google Earth. Um, I'm building Rome in 209 on Google Earth, but that's the metropolis Rome.
It's like the build biggest it got, but the Rome when it was in the Republic and it's the interesting part of your time when interesting writers are gone.
Um, um, there were lots of houses up on the hills and so now I'm going to know where all the houses are and I can, I can rebuild that Rome.
It's a totally different realm. You can totally rebuild too. So that's going to be really cool.
Um, but yeah, uh, as far as the order, I think as soon as I'm done with these books, I might, yeah, get going on, uh, Rome, uh, on Google Earth.
And, um, also the 160,000 people in the world, cause that'll give me a reason to get in shape and I need that.
I've kind of been feeling bad lately.
Um, and so, yeah, so maybe like a couple more weeks on the books, but, um, and so, yeah, listening to, um, Tess's adults today.
And, uh, when I was working over at my mom's house and then, um, yeah.
Um, and, um, yeah, and at night we just finished with my lovely girlfriend, Kirsten, um, Rain.
And then we're going to get started on Borgia.
She, she starts on episode three. I did the first two and so, but I watched Borgia myself so I can compare the two.
That'll be interesting. I'll do a video about that one day.

Um, so, I'd like to apologize for, uh, the violence, all the violence in my video yesterday, but the problem was I just wanted to add all of the, like, uh, green screens that I wanted, but I won't do any more of the violence.
I'll do more happy ones now, like plants and stuff, so.
I just wanted to get, like, every one of my videos up, you know.
So, anyway.
Alright, peace out.
